text:
I had always felt mysterious like a cat.
It was my favorite animal anyway.


I chased mice.

I stole birds.

I found little treasures.

My owner loved that.




I thought I could always go there.


I hid my tail.

I found big owls.

I didn't scare them.


I found my way through tall trees.


I didn't mind.


That's where I belonged.


I'd sleep there.



I could find berries.




My owner found me.



I didn't want to.


I stole berries.


She gave them treats.



That's my island.


I could listen.


That's my job.




I think?


I think?

I think?

I think?

I think?

That would be neat?




Just think?

It feels quiet?

What lives there?


Oh.

Lots.




There I belong.


That's enough.




I don't know.



That?

That's cool.



I think I could live.


I want.


I think I take?

That?




That's my home.


That
